articles.title: ‘Being at sea does change a person’: Tall Ships inspire Boston’s young sailors
articles.description:
Local sailing centers turn a week of harbor crowds and logistical challenges into an unforgettable experience on the water.

The post ‘Being at sea does change a person’: Tall Ships inspire Boston’s young sailors appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local sailing centers host Tall Ships event, enhancing youth sailing experiences.
Over 200 young sailors participated in the week-long event in July 2026.
The event fosters community engagement and inspires future generations of sailors.

articles.title: Massachusetts issues statewide air quality alert due to Canadian wildfire smoke
articles.description:
The statewide air quality alert is in effect through 12 a.m. Thursday.

The post Massachusetts issues statewide air quality alert due to Canadian wildfire smoke appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts issues air quality alert due to Canadian wildfire smoke until 12 a.m. Thursday.
Residents advised to limit outdoor activities, especially those with respiratory issues.
Air quality may affect visibility and health across the state, including Boston.

articles.title: Look inside Oosterschelde, the historic Dutch tall ship at Sail Boston
articles.description:
Also, check out the Dutch martini and other Dutch goodies being served at nearby Rowes Wharf Sea Grille.

The post Look inside Oosterschelde, the historic Dutch tall ship at Sail Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Visit the historic Dutch tall ship Oosterschelde at Sail Boston through July 15.
Enjoy Dutch martinis and other specialties at Rowes Wharf Sea Grille nearby.
Experience cultural exchange and maritime history during this local event for residents.

articles.title: Hegseth announces new policy to test troops for low testosterone
articles.description:
The screenings will be conducted annually as part of service members' required medical screenings for those 30 and older, Hegseth said.

The post Hegseth announces new policy to test troops for low testosterone appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hegseth announces annual testosterone screenings for troops aged 30 and older.
Policy affects Boston-area service members, enhancing their health monitoring.
Improved health screenings aim to address potential issues in military readiness.

articles.title: Biden will publish ‘Promise Me, America’ memoir after the November midterm elections
articles.description:
“'Promise Me, America' is about the challenges we faced as a nation. It’s about the decisions I made and why I made them,” Biden said in a video statement.

The post Biden will publish ‘Promise Me, America’ memoir after the November midterm elections appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Biden's memoir 'Promise Me, America' will be released post-November midterm elections.
The book discusses national challenges and Biden's decision-making processes.
Boston residents may gain insights into federal policies affecting local communities.
